name: Coconut Shrimp with Calypso Punch Relish Dnsr3
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Shrimp-large and peeled with tails,
1 tbsp Orange zest, grated from the top layer
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix shrimp, eggs, honey, cayenne pepper, tabasco sauce, all-purpose flour, cornstarch, curry powder, bread crumbs, shredded coconut, orange zest, and orange peel in a large bowl.
2. Heat the oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 350°F (175°C).
3. Remove the oil from heat when it reaches the desired temperature.
4. Dredge each shrimp in the mixture and carefully lower them into the hot oil using tongs.
5. Fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
6. Drain on a wire rack lined with paper towels.
7. Serve immediately with Calypso Punch Relish.
